x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Data classification prevents Now Assist from including sensitive data (PII, PCI, PHI) in AI prompts and summaries. Without data classification, Now Assist may inadvertently expose sensitive information in AI-generated responses.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Data Classification plugin and configure classification rules via dl_class_list.do. Define sensitivity labels for tables containing PII/PCI/PHI. Data classification is a compliance prerequisite for Now Assist in regulated environments.
